emails.subject: Re: Trade date for deal 475585.01
emails.body: Re: Trade date for deal 475585.01 Thanks for keeping me up to date. Out of curiosity, do you know why El Paso changed the trade date in the first place? Kate Stephanie Piwetz 12/20/2000 01:45 PM

emails.subject: Trade date for deal 475585.01
emails.body: Trade date for deal 475585.01 Kate, just fyi, El Paso struck thru our 12/6/00 trade date and placed 12/5/00. I spoke to Chi, of El Paso and he said the 12/6/00 was okay. I just made a note on the confirm and sending it to the fileroom to be executed. Thanks Stephanie

emails.subject: Re: Trade date for deal 475585.01
emails.body: Kate They just had it as 12/5/00 in the system and with the deal being done direct, it is tough to have proof from my end when the deal was done. Is this okay? We just ensure the trade dates match up so it will ease the end of month check out, to make sure there was not more then one deal out there that it could be confused with. But the deal on our end was done on 12/6/00 correct? thanks Stephanie Kate Symes 12/20/2000 04:25 PM
